Body.Content:
I can access Universal Print audit records of key administrator and user activities, such as print job submissions, configuration changes, and printer registrations. Audit records will be available in Microsoft Purview’s Unified Audit Log for compliance and long-term record-keeping.

GA date: July CY2026

Preview date: April CY2026

Details.Value: DoD, GCC, GCC High, Worldwide (Standard Multi-Tenant)
